disruptions.description: CLAPHAM JUNCTION: From Tuesday 24 March 2026 until November 2027, the footbridge at Clapham Junction will be modernised, section by section. The bridge will remain open, but space will be reduced. If you are travelling to or changing trains at Clapham Junction, please allow extra time for your journey.

disruptions.description: LONDON ROAD, KT2: From 22:00 on Sunday 31 May until 22:00 on Sunday 28 June, ROUTES 57 85 213 371 K2 K3 K4 K5 and SL7 towards Clapham Park, Putney Bridge, Sutton, Richmond, Roehampton Vale, Kingston Hospital, Morden and West Croydon, are on diversion due to works taking place on London Road. Bus stop 'Tiffin School / London Road' (B) will not be served. Please allow extra time for your journey.

disruptions.description: EXHIBITION ROAD, SW7: Route 360 is curtailed daily due to an event. On Friday 05 June, from 08:30 to 17:00. On Saturday 06 June, from 07:00 to 20:00. On Sunday 07 June, from 08:00 to 22:00. Buses are curtailed to South Kensington Station, missing the stops South Kensington Museums 'L' & 'K', Royal Albert Hall 'RC', Prince Consort Road 'RS' & 'RZ', and Prince Consort Road / Imperial College 'RW'.

PELHAM STREET SW3: Road closed westbound until Friday 26 June 2026 18:00, due to construction works. During these works, ROUTE 360 towards South Kensington will be diverted via Fulham Road and Onslow Place. STOP NOT SERVED: Pelham Street (A). Use next or previous stop.
